description: OpusAIMobility Consolidated HTTP API Gateway configuration. Routes requests to both OpusAIMobility Lambda ($default) and TerraAI ECS Fargate (/terra/*) via VPC Link.

api.name: opusaimobility-http-api
api.description: Unified API Gateway for OpusAIMobility and TerraAI services

vpcLink.name: opusaimobility-terra-vpc-link
vpcLink.description: VPC Link connecting API Gateway to TerraAI ALB in private subnets

opusaimobilityLambda.description: Integration to existing OpusAIMobility Lambda function

terraVpcLink.description: VPC Link integration to TerraAI ALB in private subnets

routes.description: Routes all TerraAI API requests to ECS Fargate via VPC Link to ALB. Strips /terra prefix via path rewrite.
Default route forwards all non-TerraAI requests to existing OpusAIMobility Lambda function with original path preserved.

fallback.description: Returned when no route matches the request path

deploymentNotes.vpcLinkSetup: Create VPC Link targeting ALB in private subnets before configuring the terraVpcLink integration.
deploymentNotes.pathRewrite: The /terra prefix is stripped by the requestParameters mapping. Request to /terra/chat is forwarded as /chat to the ALB.
deploymentNotes.existingLambda: The $default route continues pointing to the existing OpusAIMobility Lambda (opusaimobility-api). No changes to existing Lambda integration required.
deploymentNotes.timeoutBehavior: If TerraAI does not respond within 29s, API Gateway returns HTTP 504 with body {"error": "Gateway timeout"}.
deploymentNotes.fallbackBehavior: Unmatched paths return HTTP 404 with body {"error": "Path not found"}.
deploymentNotes.corsHandling: CORS is configured at the gateway level. OPTIONS requests return HTTP 200 with CORS headers and empty body.
deploymentNotes.protocolSupport: Both HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 are supported for client connections.
